descripcion: SUNAT guides, accounting tips, logistics and digitization for Peruvian SMBs. Written by our consultants.

newsletter.descripcion: 1 email a month with SUNAT news and practical tips.

posts.title: SIRE 2026: a practical guide for Peruvian SMBs

posts.excerpt: Confusion between PLE and SIRE is common. We clarify in simple terms with real examples so you make the right call.
